summary: Created 3-phase implementation plan for Sub-PR 1.1.1 (Proposition type to Lukasiewicz convention). Phase 1: branch creation and file extraction from local main (30 min). Phase 2: full CI verification pipeline (40 min). Phase 3: PR submission with proper metadata (20 min). Total effort: 1.5 hours, ~292 diff lines across 6 files.

artifacts.summary: Implementation plan for Sub-PR 1.1.1: branch creation, file extraction, CI verification, and PR submission
